mapper.select:
select wordname,word,sameid,memo,deleted,ELEMNTOBJECT from synlte.Sameword
DELETED=0
AND upper(sameId) like upper('%${sameId}%')
AND upper(wordName) like upper('%${wordName}%')
AND upper(word) like upper('%${word}%')
mapper.insert: insert into synlte.Sameword(SAMEID , WORD, WORDNAME , MEMO,deleted,ELEMNTOBJECT) VALUES (#{id},#{word},#{wordname},#{memo},0,#{elementObject})
mapper.delete: update synlte.Sameword set DELETED = 1 , SAMEID = SAMEID||#{uuid}, wordname = wordname||#{uuid} ,word = word||#{uuid} where SAMEID=#{sameId}
mapper.select: select count(0) from synlte.Sameword where SAMEID=#{sameId}
mapper.update: UPDATE synlte.Sameword set WORD =#{word} , WORDNAME =#{wordname} , MEMO =#{memo},ELEMNTOBJECT = #{elementObject} where SAMEID =#{id}
mapper.select: select fieldid ,fieldname , fieldchinesename,gadsj_fieldId as gadsjFieldId from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where sameid = #{sameId}
select count(0) from synlte.Sameword where upper(WORD) = upper(#{word}) and DELETED=0
select count(0) from synlte.Sameword where upper(WORDNAME) = upper(#{wordName}) and DELETED=0
